calendar.matters:
Re Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Complaint
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Friday, January 9, 2015:
Anthony Flores (415.235.3652), attorney by Special Appearance for Plaintiff KEARNY UNION LLC;
Mark W. Epstein of Seiler Epstein Ziegler & Applegate, LLP (415.979.0500), attorney for Real Parties in Interest JOHN SOLLNER and SAMETC, LLC;
Reginald R. Hindley (707.575.3700), Party in Interest, in Propria Persona.

The Court, having reviewed the briefs submitted and having heard oral argument, RULES as follows: PLAINTIFF KEARNY UNION LLC'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Complaint is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; Reporter: Mary Ann Scanlan-Stone, CSR No. 8875, Tel.: 415.834.1114. (501)
